unit: Arya / Braavos — House of Black and White (A2.3, build+enrich)

new_nodes.note: ASOS: boards the Titan's Daughter, pays the captain, gives the iron coin + 'valar morghulis'.
AFFC I: passes the Titan, Yorko rows her in, the skull-test, gives her name.
AFFC II/Cat: surrenders her identity, becomes a novice 'no one' + the Cat cover (parallel to sansa-adopts-alayne).
the one thing she refuses to surrender; SUB_BEAT of becoming Cat.
Cat slits the deserter Dareon's throat in an alley — an UNAUTHORIZED kill (the whole point).
the warm-milk punishment for killing Dareon for herself.
ADWD Blind Girl: trains as Blind Beth, wargs the cat, catches her trainer, sight restored.
ADWD Ugly Little Girl: the coin-swap kill of the insurance underwriter — her first FM-sanctioned kill; earns a face.
Jaqen's gift; the passage token to Braavos — the Harrenhal->Braavos seam object. Did NOT exist.
Cat's concealed blade (taught by Red Roggo); the purse-slitting instrument of the assassination. Did NOT exist.

node_alias_hygiene: arya-stark ALREADY carries Salty / Cat of the Canals / Blind Beth / The blind girl / The ugly girl / Nan / Squab / Weasel / Arry / The night wolf in frontmatter (prior pass) — NO alias-add needed. NO separate persona nodes (matches the Sansa-Alayne + Theon-Reek convention: identity-assumption = event.deception node + aliases, not character nodes).

retire_candidates.reason: DIRECTION ERROR — the Kindly Man tutors Arya, not the reverse; redundant with the existing kindly-man TEACHES arya at the same line. Retire in finalize IF fresh-verify confirms.

dropped_at_synthesis: Persona NODES (salty/cat-of-the-canals/blind-beth/ugly-girl-face) — handled by arya-stark aliases + the event.deception node (convention).
the-insurance-underwriter node — unnamed, single-use, zero traversal value (both Lens A + B agreed). Victim captured in the assassination event scope.
plague-face-priest node — unnamed single-use FM; the assassination COMMANDS_IN goes to kindly-man (who presides + confirms).
myrish-mirror node — low traversal value (training tool); NEEDS_VOCAB on the wiring (no USES/TRAINS_WITH). -> harvest.
Dareon -> Sam/Aemon ENABLES seam (Lens D SEAM 2) — FORWARD-DANGLING: no death-of-maester-aemon node exists; defer to the Sam/Oldtown arc enrichment (don't mint into a void). -> harvest.
EXECUTES upgrade of arya KILLS dareon (Lens A/D) — NOT judicial (vigilante alley kill); KILLS stays. Reified via AGENT_IN/VICTIM_IN on killing-of-dareon.
DISGUISED_AS worn-face edges (Lens B) — no target nodes for the dead-girl face; captured in the assassination event scope + harvest.
Lysa-death news / Hardhome-slaves news / Syrio resonance seams (Lens D 4/5/7) — WEAK (overheard rumor, no downstream consequence); -> harvest pointers.

edges.quote: I shall lower a boat, and Yorko will put you ashore.
edges.note: The sea voyage delivers her to Braavos; the captain puts her ashore at the HoBaW. Journey transition = ENABLES.

edges.quote: from that moment she was a novice in the House of Black and White
edges.note: Passing the threshold/skull-test and accepting novice status opens the Cat cover-identity assignment.

edges.quote: He has need of a girl to push his barrow and sell his cockles, clams, and mussels to the sailors off the ships.
edges.note: Cat works the wharves where Dareon sings — her dockside cover puts her in his orbit; she CHOOSES to kill him (door-opener = ENABLES).

edges.quote: they would have taken her eyes from her anyway, to help her to learn to use her other senses, but not for half a year
edges.note: The blinding is the FM punishment for killing Dareon for herself — explicitly accelerated by half a year.

edges.quote: the waif took her by the hand and led her through the vaults and tunnels of the rock on which the House of Black and White was built
edges.note: Blindness is the precondition for the sense-training curriculum.

edges.quote: we will see if you are truly worthy to serve Him of Many Faces
edges.note: Having regained sight and proven her senses, she is judged ready and given her first sanctioned kill.

edges.quote: She pushed the sword and sheath behind the step, then shoved the stone back into place, so it looked like all the other stones.
edges.note: Hiding Needle is a beat within the identity-surrender — the one thing Arya refuses to give up; the moral seam.

edges.quote: as loud as if she'd known what it meant
edges.note: Arya presents the coin + says the words; the actor of the departure.

edges.quote: he replied, touching his brow with two fingers.
edges.note: The captain recognizes the coin (valar dohaeris) and grants the cabin/passage — co-agent.

edges.quote: She pulled it from her pouch and held it up.
edges.note: Arya at the weirwood-and-ebony doors, showing the coin to gain entry.

edges.quote: Beneath he had no face; only a yellowed skull with a few scraps of skin still clinging to the cheeks
edges.note: The kindly man administers the skull-test (Kiss me, child).

edges.quote: a pale little girl in a cowled robe that seemed to engulf her
edges.note: The waif is present at the arrival/skull-test (touches Arya's arm; she warns 'I killed the boy who grabbed me last').

edges.quote: You are Cat, an orphan of
edges.note: Arya proposes/accepts the Cat identity.

edges.quote: a fishmonger named Brusco, a good man with a bad back
edges.note: The kindly man authorizes + frames the cover identity (Brusco, the barrow).

edges.quote: She pushed the sword and sheath behind the step
edges.note: Arya is the sole agent of the needle-hiding.

edges.quote: said Cat as they stepped into the gloom of a twisty little alley.
edges.note: Cat ('Just so') kills Dareon in the alley.

edges.quote: Dareon is dead. The black singer who was sleeping at the Happy Port.
edges.note: Dareon the named victim (throat slit, boots taken, pushed in a canal).

edges.quote: Do me a kindness and bring a cup of wine for me and warm milk for our friend Arya
edges.note: The kindly man orders the warm-milk blinding draught.

edges.quote: When she woke the next morning, she was blind.
edges.note: Arya is blinded.

edges.quote: Each night at supper the waif brought her a cup of milk and told her to drink it down.
edges.note: The waif administers the blinding draught (the milk regime is hers; the initial dose is fetched on the kindly man's order). Tier-2 (indirect).

edges.quote: Count the steps as you climb
edges.note: Arya undergoes the blind sense-training.

edges.quote: Would you like to have your eyes back? Ask, and you shall see.
edges.note: The kindly man runs the blind regime + the secret stick-training; controls the sight-restoration.

edges.quote: Her blade flashed out, smooth and quick, one deep slash through the velvet and he never felt a thing.
edges.note: Arya executes the coin-swap (slits the shipowner's purse, plants the poisoned coin).

edges.quote: He is writing each a binder.
edges.note: The kindly man directs the target (the insurance binder-writer) + confirms the kill (his heart gave out).

edges.quote: the small black iron coin that Jaqen H'ghar had given her
edges.note: Jaqen's gift at Harrenhal — the passage token (giver = Jaqen H'ghar; ties the Harrenhal arc to Braavos).

edges.quote: the small black iron coin that Jaqen H'ghar had given her, so worn the man whose head it bore had no features
edges.note: Arya carries the coin from Westeros into Braavos.

edges.quote: She pressed it into his hand, the small black iron coin
edges.note: The coin is used to secure passage on the Titan's Daughter.

edges.quote: She pulled it from her pouch and held it up.
edges.note: The coin is shown at the HoBaW doors to gain entry (with 'valar morghulis').

edges.quote: the small black iron coin that Jaqen H'ghar had given her, so worn
edges.note: SEAM (Harrenhal->Braavos): the coin is the precondition for passage — the captain grants a cabin only when she produces it. Without the Harrenhal gift the Braavos arc is unreachable.

edges.quote: For half a heartbeat she let herself pretend that it was her home ahead.
edges.note: Arya's first presence edge to braavos (the node had zero Arya edges).

edges.quote: This is the House of Black and White, my child.
edges.note: HoBaW is Arya's home for the arc.

edges.quote: said Cat as they stepped into the gloom of a twisty little alley.
edges.note: The killing happens in a Braavos back-alley near the Happy Port.

edges.quote: His legs bestrode the gap, one foot planted on each mountain
edges.note: Orphan fix: the Titan guards the Braavos sea-approach (0 edges before).

edges.quote: On their left appeared a rocky knoll with a windowless temple of dark grey stone at its top.
edges.note: The HoBaW sits on a rocky knoll in Braavos.

edges.quote: she had her finger knife. She kept it very sharp, and knew how to use it too.
edges.note: Cat's concealed blade (Red Roggo taught her the purse-slitting).

edges.quote: slit the purse open with the finger knife, filled her fist with gold
edges.note: Arya wields the finger knife in the assassination.

edges.quote: her finger knife poised
edges.note: The finger knife is the purse-cutting instrument of the coin-swap kill.

edges.quote: Dareon had been a deserter from the Night's Watch; he had deserved to die.
edges.note: SEAM (Night's Watch desertion -> Braavos): his desertion activates Arya's Ned's-justice ethos — she executes him as a deserter (the Stark code: deserters die).

edges.quote: Dunsen, Raff the Sweetling, Ser Ilyn, Ser Meryn, Queen Cersei.
edges.note: SEAM (internal): the kill-list (crystallized hate/identity) stands in deliberate opposition to the FM demand to surrender all hate and become no one. Gives the isolated kill-list node its first outbound edge.

edges.quote: Men may whisper of the Faceless Men of Braavos, but we are older than the Secret City.
edges.note: Reveals the FM origin/founding myth (Valyria, the Fourteen Flames, the first gift).

edges.quote: I was born the only child of an ancient House, my noble father's heir
edges.note: The waif reveals her poisoned-stepmother backstory (her 'gift' cost).

edges.quote: Learn three new things before you come back to us
edges.note: Arya-as-Cat is the FM's harbor intelligence asset — debriefed on every return (the three-things obligation).

edges.quote: whisper any names
edges.note: Arya conceals her kill-list/true self with a flat denial; the kindly man always sees through her (the heart of the identity struggle).

edges.quote: Starting with the tongue of Braavos.
edges.note: The waif tutors Arya (Braavosi + poisons); a NEW edge (only kindly-man TEACHES/TUTORS existed).
